# Caption fonts (not vendored)

Place these Google Fonts (all OFL-licensed) here before running the bundle step:

- `Montserrat-Bold.ttf` — Bold + Karaoke styles
- `Bangers-Regular.ttf` — Bounce style
- `Inter-Bold.ttf` — Clean style

Download from https://fonts.google.com/. If absent, captions fall back to the
system sans-serif stack (renders fine, just less branded).
